CustomField.description: This field is used to calculate days from last transfer.
CustomField.formula: ROUND( CASE( TEXT(ClosedStatus__c) ,'Converted', Converted_Date__c ,'Abandoned',DATEVALUE(RejectedDate__c) ,'Future Nurturing',DATEVALUE(TurnbackDate__c) , Today() ) - DATEVALUE(fxLastDateTransfer__c) ,0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used to calculate days from last transfer.
CustomField.label: fxDaysFromLastTransfer
